text: I feel a sense of curiosity and anticipation in this modern, brightly-lit space. The glass walls and blue light evoke a clinical and futuristic atmosphere, hinting at innovation beyond the threshold. When I step closer and see the R+D exhibition, my mind is drawn to the interplay between humans and machines, sparking existential questions about innovation, coexistence, and meaning. Here, I find myself both participant and observer in the ongoing dialogue between technology and humanity.
